# Agent Role Map

Use this file as a quick reference when assigning documentation work.

| Need | Recommended Agent |
|------|-------------------|
| Architecture overview | Documentation Lead |
| Business rules | Business Analyst |
| QA test plan | QA Engineer |
| Technical debt and risks | Legacy Code Analyst |
| Refactoring roadmap | Refactoring Planner |
| Session continuity | Session Logger |
| Backlog or progress tracking | Work Monitor |

Suggested local rename pattern if a team wants custom personas:

| Generic Role | Local Alias Example |
|--------------|---------------------|
| Documentation Lead | Platform Architect |
| Business Analyst | Product Analyst |
| QA Engineer | Validation Lead |
| Legacy Code Analyst | Reliability Engineer |
| Refactoring Planner | Modernization Lead |
| Session Logger | Project Recorder |
| Work Monitor | Delivery Coordinator |
